.file-embed.background: rgb(5, 5, 5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(23, 25, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-header-breadcrumb.font-family: "??", "??", Cairo, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-breadcrumb-separator.font-family: "??", "??", Cairo, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-title.background: rgb(15, 81, 114) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.view-header-title.font-family: "??", "??", Cairo, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

blockquote.background: rgb(5, 5, 5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(23, 25, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(23, 25, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(153, 16, 139) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(23, 25, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(153, 16, 139) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(15, 81, 114) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(15, 81, 114) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.font-family: "??", "??", Cairo, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.multi-select-pill-content.font-family: "??", "??", Cairo, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.prompt.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(5, 5, 5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(28, 43, 11) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(5, 5, 5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(5, 5, 5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
